Property.Property: Used to securely connect to Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters without requiring any inbound port to be enabled on the firewall.
Used to download Resource bridge (appliance) images.
For the notification service for extension and connectivity scenarios
Used for identity and access control
For official Microsoft artifacts such as container images
Used to download images and agents.
Used for metrics and monitoring telemetry traffic.
For Active Directory Authority and authentication, token fetch, and validation
Initial Azure Local cluster registration, bootstrapping and management operations.
For the notification service for extension and connectivity scenarios.
For Dataplane that pushes up diagnostics data, billing data and used in the Portal pipeline
Azure Stack HCI Arc extensions deployment
Portal for cluster registration and to unregister the cluster .
For Graph authentication and Azure Resource Bridge RBAC.
For Dataplane that pushes up diagnostics data, billing data and used in the Portal pipeline
For Active Directory Authority and authentication, token fetch, and validation.
Used for ARM operations in Azure Government.
Used for data plane operations for Resource bridge (appliance).
Used for metrics and monitoring telemetry traffic.
To install required PSGallery modules for Arc registration
For Dataplane that pushes up diagnostics data, billing data and used in the Portal pipeline
For official Microsoft artifacts such as container images
For official Microsoft artifacts such as container images. Required for bandwidth testing.
Resource bridge (appliance) client needs to Validate python package versions
Azure Resource Manager - to create or delete the Arc enabled components
Required for the agent to connect to Azure and register the cluster.

For downloading Resource bridge (appliance) container images
To periodically send Telemetry from HCI or Windows Server host
Azure Local ARB Infrastructure for ARB Extensions
Static website hosted in Azure storage for stack-hci-vm CLI extension files.
For Microsoft Update, allowing the OS to receive updates.

For Microsoft Update, allowing the OS to receive updates.
Used to download Resource bridge (appliance) images.
Well known endpoint for Root CA thumbprint validation
